rationale: Walked R1-R9; every requirement has an implementation AND a non-decorative pinning test. R1 gates map + generalized reviewer entry + note -> PerGateProtocolRoundTrips/RefusesPerGateKnobs/GatesAbsentByteIdentical109. R2 backward-compat (count-less->1, gates:{}==absent, 109 fixture identity, resolvers==global) fully covered. R3 resolvers + expandSlots -> DeterministicExpansion pins the normative 9-reviewer worked example, cursor-starts-at-0, cursor-not-reset-on-explicit, and Model-wins via deliberate falsifiability fixtures. R4 refusals (a-h incl. both inheritance-chain shapes + unknown-model-does-not-error) each assert a recovery line. R5 substitutes (self-map/empty-sided refused, round-trip, in_force supersession). R6 Gate field decision-inert -> GateFieldDecisionInert (absent/known/unexpected, no Registration.Err, legacy byte-identical) + ADR-0037 amendment present. R7 gate-aware advisory via single-home PanelGateAdvisoryDefault, both call sites, all skip carve-outs. R8/R9 render + JSON 5-member contract + hostile-string escaping + never-null, byte-exact round-trip. Build green, touched packages green, leaf/guard/amendment invariants hold. No partial delivery, no decorative test, no missing AC.
findings: R2->DefaultConfig unchanged + globalReviewers + loadUncached backfill; TestLoad_GatesAbsentByteIdentical109 explicitly pins count-less->1, gates:{}==absent, 109 AC7 fixture field-identity, and gate-scoped resolvers==global. Complete.

R3->PanelGate{ExpectedReviewers,ApproveThresholdExpr,ReviewerSlots}+resolveGate*+expandSlots; TestPanelGateResolvers_FallbackAndAdhoc (per-field inheritance both directions, unknown-gate errors, raw expr) and TestPanelGateSlots_DeterministicExpansion (normative worked example R1=author-of-record..R9=codebase-pin, cursor-start-0 falsifiability fixture, cursor-no-reset fixture, Model-wins). Non-decorative.

R4->validateGates+validateReviewerEntries; TestLoad_RefusesPerGateKnobs covers all eight refusal classes incl. global-int-inherited-by-smaller-gate and bead-int-through-adhoc-chain, plus negative control unknown-model-does-not-error; TestLoad_UnknownGateKeyEscapesControlBytes pins the G1 injection fix. Complete.
R5->Substitution.Substitutes+validateGates sub loop; refusals + round-trip + in_force supersession in TestConfigShowGate_ResolvedJSON. Complete.

R6->panel.Panel.Gate (json omitempty, parse-lenient, decision-inert); TestPanel_GateFieldDecisionInert proves PanelGateDecision/ApproveThreshold unchanged across absent/known/unexpected, no Registration.Err, legacy byte-identical; go list -deps confirms leaf stays config-free; ADR-0037 has 3 amendments + decision-inert note. Complete.

R7->cfg.PanelGateAdvisoryDefault single-home selection rule wired at both complete.go step 2.25 and cmd reviewerCountNotesFor; TestPanelAdvisory_GateAwareCompare + TestConfigShow_ReviewerCountNoteGateAware + TestPanelGateAdvisoryDefault_SelectionRule cover gate-match/mismatch, non-bead skip carve-out, unknown-gate skip (no resolver error), gates-absent global fallback, nil-registration silence. Complete.

R8->renderGates/renderSubstitutes/renderKnownModelWarnings/renderGateResolved with escapeConfigValue on every added string, enum-order gates + sorted-key substitutes; TestConfigShow_GatesSubstitutesAndModelAdvisory + TestConfigShow_HostileStringsEscaped. Complete.

R9->gateResolvedDoc/buildGateResolvedDoc/gateResolvedJSON (real encoding/json); TestConfigShowGate_ResolvedJSON asserts exactly 5 documented members, agreement with R3 resolvers, in_force flip, never-null substitutes; TestConfigShow_HostileStringsEscaped asserts byte-exact hostile-value round-trip. Complete.
AC1-AC12 all map to a check; the three invariant ACs (go list -deps leaf non-zero, threshold>0 guard, ADR-0037 amendment) verified passing; go build ./... and touched-package go test all green.

MINOR (non-blocking): R7's complete-side TestPanelAdvisory_GateAwareCompare exercises the decision logic via gateAwareAdvise, a test-local reproduction of complete.go's call site that uses the real PanelGateAdvisoryDefault + reviewerCountAdvisory helpers and matches the diffed wiring exactly. The trivial `gateCfgErr==nil && panelReg!=nil` guard in Run() itself is not integration-tested, but the cmd-side TestConfigShow_ReviewerCountNoteGateAware drives the real CLI end-to-end, so the contract is covered. No change required.
